title: Scene Delta Schema
description: The logic and state changes that occur during a single scene.

from_checkpoint.description: The state of the world before the scene.

to_checkpoint.description: The state of the world after the scene is resolved.

purpose.description: Narrative intent of the scene (e.g., 'injure mara', 'reveal traitor exists'). Helps avoid flabby scenes.

cause.description: Narrative reason for the change (e.g., 'knife wound during ambush').
